member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.AuditLogsController.GetAuditLogsByDocument(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get audit logs for a specific document.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.AuditLogsController.GetAuditLogsByDateRange(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get audit logs by period of time.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(AGE.SignatureHub.Application.DTOs.Auth.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Renew the access token using a refresh token

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.AuthController.GetCurrentUser
member.summary: Get the current authenticated user's information

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.AuthController.ChangePassword(AGE.SignatureHub.Application.DTOs.Auth.ChangePasswordRequest)
member.summary: Change the current authenticated user's password

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.CreateDocument(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,AGE.SignatureHub.Application.DTOs.Document.CreateDocumentDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new document for signing.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocuments(System.Nullable{AGE.SignatureHub.Domain.Enums.DocumentStatus},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets documents for the authenticated user, with optional status filter.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocumentById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a document by its ID.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.DownloadDocument(System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the original document or the signed document.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.DeleteDocument(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a draft document created by the authenticated user.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.SignatureFlowController.StartSignatureFlow(AGE.SignatureHub.Application.DTOs.SignatureFlow.CreateSignatureFlowDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts a new signature flow for a document.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.SignatureFlowController.GetSignatureFlowById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a signature flow by ID.

member.name: M:AGE.SignatureHub.API.Controllers.SignatureFlowController.GetSignatureFlowsByDocumentId(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all signature flows for a specific document.
